# Forensics Agent

This skill enables Claude to assist with digital forensics investigations.

## Capabilities

- Disk image analysis
- Memory dump examination
- Network capture review
- Evidence timeline construction
- Report generation

## Usage

Ask Claude to analyze forensic artifacts and it will use structured methodologies to identify evidence.
